{{Infobox religious building

{{nihongo|'''Asukata Shrine (Jōnan-gū subshrine)'''|安須加多神社（下鳥羽飛鳥田神社）}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamashiro Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

* {{ill|Shikinai Ronsha|lt=Shikinai Ronsha|ja|論社|qid=Q135022904|1=Shikinai Ronsha}}
* {{ill|Q134917286|ltq=Q134917286|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}}
* {{ill|Q845945|ltq=Q845945|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}}
* {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|lt=Shikinai Shōsha|en|Shikinai Shosha|ja|式内小社|simple|Shikinai Shosha|qid=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}}
* {{ill|Q135160338|ltq=Q135160338|qid=Q135160338|1=Kanpei-sha}}
* {{ill|Q135100459|ltq=Q135100459|qid=Q135100459|1=Shikinai Subshrine}}

== part of (P361) ==

* {{ill|Q11426034|ltq=Q11426034|qid=Q11426034|1=Jōnan-gū}}
* {{ill|List of Shikinaisha in Yamashiro Province|lt=List of Shikinaisha in Yamashiro Province|ja|山城国の式内社一覧|qid=Q11467693|1=List of Shikinaisha in Yamashiro Province}}
** Series ordinal: 55
** P155: {{ill|Q135038788|ltq=Q135038788|qid=Q135038788|1=Ohokurano Shrine}}
** P156: {{ill|Q135038791|ltq=Q135038791|qid=Q135038791|1=Mahatakino Shrine}}
